summary: Retest of iteration 18's single miss (footer on /connect). Confirmed footer now renders on /connect and all previously-passing routes. No hydration errors on /connect. Email anchor with <wbr> intact. Regression spot-checks pass.
verified_assertions: /connect HTML contains data-testid="footer-wordmark", data-testid="global-footer", and 'Founded 2020. More than forty years in the making.' exactly once
/, /about, /writing, /writing/wrap-rage, /about/discernment each contain Founded 2020 footer string exactly once
/connect hydrates in Chromium with 0 console errors / hydration warnings
connect@<wbr>methodmarketinggroup.com anchor renders with correct mailto href and data-testid=connect-email-primary
About Gary page contains footer-linkedin-link testid (spot-check regression from iter 18)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18's only failure (missing footer on /connect) is resolved. 26/26 assertions now pass. Fix was removal of hideFooter conditional in App.js.
